title: Toy demo: seed RFC for reference-impl smoke examples
problem: Toy-repo needs a parent RFC so Task.context.rfc references a real document rather than a phantom ID.
solution: Provide a minimal approved RFC referenced by DEMO-001. Not a real methodology example — purely a structural placeholder.
acceptance_criteria: DEMO-001 validates against task.schema.json with a real context.rfc target.
out_of_scope: This RFC is intentionally minimal and should not be used as a quality benchmark.
